stemHtml: A jet transport aircraft takes off from an airport situated close to a noise-sensitive area. According to the airport procedures, a Noise Abatement Departure Procedure 1 (NADP-1) should be followed. Just after lift-off an engine failure occurs. According to ICAO Document 8168, the Pilot-in-Command…

options.a: is required to perform the NADP-2, if unable to safely perform the NADP-1.
options.b: has the authority to discontinue the NADP-1.
options.c: should continue flying the NADP-1 until climbing through 800 ft AGL.
options.d: should ask for ATC approval in order to discontinue the NADP-1.
